fiction.title: OUR PERFECT STORM
fiction.author: Carley Fortune
fiction.description: After her fiancé leaves her, Frankie goes on her planned honeymoon trip with her best friend from childhood, George.

fiction.title: FURY BOUND
fiction.author: Sable Sorensen
fiction.description: The second book in the Wolves of Ruin series. Meryn Cooper faces dangers to her kingdom and her heart.

fiction.title: YESTERYEAR
fiction.author: Caro Claire Burke
fiction.description: Natalie Heller Mills, a privileged tradwife social media influencer, wakes up to find she is living in the comparatively difficult reality of 1855.

fiction.title: THE CALAMITY CLUB
fiction.author: Kathryn Stockett
fiction.description: As things get tougher during the Depression, several women look for ways to improve their circumstances.

fiction.title: 26 BEAUTIES
fiction.author: James Patterson
fiction.description: The 26th book in the Women's Murder Club series. The deaths of two women are investigated, and a father seeks help in finding his missing daughter.

nonfiction.title: THE CASE FOR AMERICA
nonfiction.author: Bret Baier
nonfiction.description: The chief political anchor for Fox News shares his perspectives on our national character during divisive times.

nonfiction.title: STRANGERS
nonfiction.author: Belle Burden
nonfiction.description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward.

nonfiction.title: THE U.S. CONSTITUTION
nonfiction.author: Melissa Murray
nonfiction.description: The co-author of “The Trump Indictments” gives historical context for each of the amendments in the Constitution.

nonfiction.title: FAMESICK
nonfiction.author: Lena Dunham
nonfiction.description: The author of “Not That Kind of Girl” evaluates the effects that pursuing her creative endeavors had on her.

nonfiction.title: TRUE CRIME
nonfiction.author: Patricia Cornwell
nonfiction.description: The author, known for her Kay Scarpetta thrillers, shares moments from her life that shaped her writing career.
